items.name: DesktopShell
items.doc: Fluent desktop shell composed of toolbar, side navigation, content frame, and status bar.

items.name: nav-items
items.doc: Navigation items rendered in the left side navigation.

items.name: toolbar-items
items.doc: Toolbar items rendered in the optional toolbar row.

items.name: show-toolbar
items.doc: Controls whether the toolbar row is shown.

items.name: active-view
items.doc: Id of the currently active content view.

items.name: status-text
items.doc: Status text shown in the bottom status bar.

items.name: progress
items.doc: Optional progress value shown in the status bar. Negative hides it.

items.name: nav-collapsed
items.signature: private property <bool>   nav-collapsed: nav-width <= Spacing.xl + Spacing.sm + Spacing.xs;

items.name: navigate
items.doc: Fired when a navigation destination is selected.

items.name: toolbar-clicked
items.doc: Fired when a toolbar action is selected.
